examples: Now, Goldman is under fire over its outsize profits.
Rupert Murdoch is an outsize figure in British media and politics.
Despite its smaller share of the market, Apple earns outsize profits.
Bucksbaum has staunchly resisted paying himself the outsize salaries that more flamboyant REIT managers collect.
But Drucker also would have frowned on the formulas being used to justify such outsize compensation.
